Services.heroSubtextQuote: “The position you are recruiting for no longer exists.”
Services.heroSubtextRest: Transforming organizations in the age of AI.
Services.metaDescription: Discreet commercial frame: diagnostics, retained executive search, executive sparring, board and governance participation.
Services.title: Services
Services.lede: Useful transparency — without a brochure. Figures are orders of magnitude; final framing is set at mandate.
Services.s01Scope:
You are facing an AI transformation whose stakes go far beyond the technical scope. Before identifying the right person, we work with you to clarify the exact nature of the transformation to lead, the organizational trade-offs it implies, and the complementary investments essential to its success: governance, data, processes, tools, training, acculturation, hiring, change management, security, compliance, and new steering models.

We then define the precise mandate of the leader capable of carrying this transformation — whether already inside the organization or to be identified externally.

s01DetailSections.title: Diagnostic
items: Objectives of the expected AI transformation
Mapping of stakes and human risks
Analysis of ongoing AI initiatives and their blockers
Definition of the precise mandate for the leader who will carry the transformation
Recommendations: target profiles and packages, other elements useful to success

s01DetailSections.title: Deliverable
s01DetailSections.body: 8–15 page strategic note including detailed target profile + search mandate

s01DetailSections.title: Indicative duration
s01DetailSections.body: 3 to 5 weeks depending on scope and access.

s01DetailSections.title: Fixed fee
s01DetailSections.body: €10–20K excl. tax depending on mission intensity.

Services.s02Scope:
You want to recruit a leader capable of carrying your organization’s critical transformations driven by AI.

We identify, assess, and present a reasoned shortlist of 3 to 5 candidates able to lead your AI transformation in your specific context.

Approach: absolute confidentiality, operator-level judgment, structured recommendation, continuous support.

s02DetailSections.title: Fees
s02DetailSections.body: 30% of total annual package (fixed + target variable + annualized long-term incentives) with a floor of €30K excl. tax

Services.s03Scope:
You do not want to appoint or recruit a CAIO too early — and the role is still somewhat undefined anyway. CAIO, AI Director, CIO+, COO+?

The risk is not moving too slowly. It is moving forward blindly.

More than a sparring partner but less than an operating executive, we act as an external expert in complex, sensitive contexts where AI becomes a matter of leadership, governance, and organizational transformation.

Discernment, trade-offs, clarity.

s03DetailSections.title: Preparing sensitive decisions
items: One 60–90 min video call per month, one-to-one or with a small committee
Sparring on AI transformation topics (use cases, hiring, organization)
Market reading and ad hoc competitive intelligence
Asynchronous availability (response within 48h on ad hoc questions)

s03DetailSections.title: Format
s03DetailSections.body: Fixed agenda, controlled duration, contractual confidentiality

s03DetailSections.title: Fixed fee
s03DetailSections.body: €5–10K excl. tax per month depending on intensity, renewable annual contract

s03DetailSections.title: Payment
s03DetailSections.body: Monthly, due at the start of the month.

Services.s04Scope:
You want to integrate AI-related stakes at the highest level of the organization — board, governance, strategic committee, or executive leadership — without reducing the subject to a purely technological question.

We participate in select boards, advisory boards, and governance forums facing sensitive organizational transformations driven by AI.

An external, operational, expert, and independent perspective on:
— structuring AI responsibilities,
— trade-offs between innovation, control, and execution,
— organizational impacts of technology decisions,
— evolutions in governance and leadership,
— risks of fragmentation, paralysis, or misallocation of resources.

s04DetailSections.title: Framing and vigilance at the highest level
s04DetailSections.body: Support for executives, boards, and shareholders: framing of AI and transformation stakes, vigilance on trade-offs, targeted input to reflection without substituting for executive management.

s04DetailSections.title: Indicative duration
s04DetailSections.body: Mandate aligned with the organization’s calendar — typically 12 to 36 months.

s04DetailSections.title: Format
s04DetailSections.body: Clear mandate letter, NDA, independence and conflict disclosures, preparation and participation in committees.

s04DetailSections.title: Fixed fee
s04DetailSections.body: Preparation and participation: to be agreed

s04DetailSections.title: Payment
s04DetailSections.body: Per mandate: annual, quarterly, or milestones tied to meetings.
